description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in semi-formal attire, featuring a collared shirt with rolled-up sleeves and a necktie, paired with fitted trousers. The figure has a clean-shaven face and short, neatly styled hair. The arms are extended outward horizontally, and the hands are relaxed with fingers slightly spread. The shoes are formal, complementing the overall business-casual appearance. The facial features are stylized but clearly defined, and the body proportions are realistic. The figure is suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, offices, or public spaces.
description: A male adult in semi-formal attire with a collared shirt, necktie, fitted trousers, and formal shoes, standing with arms extended outward.
description_view_0: Front view showing the collared shirt, necktie, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the rolled-up sleeve, and the side of the trousers and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and trousers, with both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side of the trousers and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: collared shirt with rolled-up sleeves, necktie, fitted trousers, formal style
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
